title: RideHorse
body:
__Overview__

When the author was at the same table with a classmate from his school, he kept chanting "I want to make a horse", and he had this inspiration.

__Play__

The mod adds a whip, right-clicking on the creature to whip the mob, giving it a speed I of 114 ticks and 3 damage.

Right-clicking on the block also boosts (rewards) himself, giving the player a speed I of 114 Ticks and 3 damage.
